Legal

Terms & Conditions

The terms that govern your use of our website and your generous contributions.

Terms & Conditions

Welcome to the PADUP Foundation website.

By accessing this website or making a donation, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms and Conditions.

1. Voluntary Donations

All contributions made through this website are voluntary donations intended to support the humanitarian and community development programs carried out by PADUP Foundation (RC: IT153823).

2. Refund & Cancellation Policy

Because donations are voluntary charitable contributions, all successful donations are generally non-refundable.

However, if a donation was made due to:

  • A technical system error
  • Duplicate payment
  • Unauthorized card use

The donor should contact:

info@padupfoundation.org

within 7 days of the transaction.

Verified duplicate payments or confirmed technical errors should be refunded through Flutterwave back to the original payment source within 5–7 business days.

3. Accuracy of Donor Information

Donors agree to provide accurate and up-to-date information during the donation process for regulatory compliance and communication purposes.

4. Governing Law

These Terms and Conditions shall be governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of the Federal Republic of Nigeria.

Ending period poverty and empowering every girl's potential through menstrual hygiene support, education, and advocacy.
